item.title: René Smit | Data Analysis and Visualization
item.dc:creator: renesmit
item.content:encoded:
Hi, I'm René Smit.

Helping people have a better day is what it's all about — whether that shows up in teaching yoga, coaching, analyzing data, designing visuals, or creating holiday experiences people remember.

The approach is always the same: energy, care, and a practical mindset, with one goal: create positive impact. Take a look at the showcase to see what's on offer. If there's a match, let's explore how to support your project, your team, or your personal goals.

Data analysis

I’ve built a strong skill set in data analysis and data visualization, using Python, Streamlit, and Plotly to create interactive dashboards, run statistical analyses, and turn complex data into clear, practical insights.

Through model building and visual storytelling, I make data easy to explore, simple to reproduce, and useful for real decisions.

Read articles
See scripts

Graphic and website design

My creative side also shows up in graphic design. I enjoy creating visuals like logos, maps or presentations that look good and communicate clearly.

AI generated output can be turned into fully editable design files or presentation decks, so the work can be refined and reused with ease.

I also enjoy website design, where ideas turn into clean pages that feel good to use.

See portfolio

Acro yoga

I’m passionate about practicing acroyoga and helping others discover it too. It’s a partner practice that blends strength, balance, and flow, and it works best when people use clear communication and genuine care for each other.

Besides practicing at an intermediate level, I also put real energy into the community side. The goal is to create jams and spaces that feel welcoming, inclusive, and safe.

Acroyoga is more than training. It’s a way to build trust, strengthen collaboration, and stay present with others.

See highlights
Acro Flowchart

Yoga

After completing my 200 hour yoga teacher training at Samyak Yoga (RYS 200) in Mysore, India in 2016, I’ve been teaching Hatha Yoga with a lot of energy and care.

Each class is adapted to your level, so beginners feel safe and experienced students still feel challenged. You can expect clear guidance, options for each pose, and when it fits, hands on assists and adjustments to help you find comfort and alignment.

We focus on breath, attention, and a steady, grounded pace, and we end with a long, calm savasana. Yoga can be spiritual, but my classes are practical and accessible, so it stays relatable and useful in daily life.

YepYoga

Coaching

The goal of coaching here is simple: moving you from ideas to real progress. I’ve supported many people with setting goals, and taking practical steps toward what they really want. Sometimes that means finding direction. Sometimes it means building something concrete, like starting a business.

More structured topics are also possible, like improving service quality or creating a clear financial life plan that fits your reality and priorities.

Expect a coaching style that is supportive and direct. You get encouragement, honest feedback, and a plan you can actually follow so you can build results that last.

Life coaching
Financial coaching

Tourism & hospitality

Alongside my other work, I have extensive experience in tourism and hospitality. Recent seasons as a Holiday Representative meant making sure families feel welcome, informed, and taken care of so their vacation runs smoothly and stays memorable.

A solid background in hospitality service also covers work as a waiter in both party catering and a theme park setting. Skills from other fields are brought into this work, like infographics, maps, and data analysis,

Strong customer service and the ability to handle different guest expectations with tact and warmth are at the core of it — always going the extra step to make sure guests feel heard, supported, and happy.

See CV

Let's connect!

If something speaks to you, send a message. Hearing what you're working on and finding the next step together is what this is all about.

Let's embark on this beautiful journey together!

item.title: Graphic design and cartography
item.dc:creator: renesmit
item.content:encoded:
Websites

Webapps

item.title: Coaching
item.dc:creator: renesmit
item.content:encoded:
Connect. Serve. Reflect.

Welcome. I'm Rene from The Netherlands.

My life revolves around the principle of “serving“. From my experience as a waiter to my roles in tourism and as a yoga teacher, I've found fulfillment in guiding and assisting others towards their aspirations and needs.

Throughout my journey, I've assisted numerous individuals in defining and achieving their goals, unraveling their true purpose, and practically establishing companies or crafting financial plans.

I'm here to share my expertise and experiences with the world, dedicated to helping you live the life you aspire to.

Now is the time to get closer to your aspirations and yourself.

Allow me to assist you in reaching your goals. And if you're yet to define them, let's uncover and shape them together!

Contact me for a discovery call!

How may I serve you ?

Where do you want us to work on together ? To give you some ideas….

Lifegoals

Clarifying your life's direction and priorities. Considering a new path?

With extensive experience in this realm, I'm eager to assist you in discovering your purpose and mission, or realizing your cherished dreams.

Yoga & meditation

Seeking tranquility? Longing to connect with yourself?

Having completed my Yoga Teacher Training in India in 2016, I'm well-equipped to guide you through a yoga sequence or meditation practice, aiding you in self-discovery and aligning with your goals. I'm also actively involved with the label YepYoga.

Own business

Do you have an innovative idea? Or the desire for independence?

Let me support you in developing your plans. I offer assistance at the operational, tactical, or strategic level for your existing business or venture.

Money

Struggling to make ends meet? Aim to clear debts or achieve specific financial goals?

Utilizing insights and strategies, I can help you realize your goals (such as working fewer months per year) and turn your dreams into reality!

Lifestyle

Constant fatigue? Want to adopt a healthier lifestyle?

Let me assist you in making beneficial lifestyle choices and aid in effective time management. When necessary, I can connect you with specialists from my network.

About My Journey

My professional journey began in a renowned restaurant within a major theme park in France. Not only did I find contentment in my work, but I also delighted guests with my service.

However, a persistent thought lingered: there must be a deeper fulfillment. I believed I could embrace greater joy and play a more impactful role in the world!

Consequently, I made the bold decision to depart from my stable job and chart a new path.

Interestingly, I embarked on this journey not just once, but twice! Each time, I discovered that despite returning to a familiar point, we continue evolving.

Through the highs and lows, I now live a life that was once merely a dream, currently seated on a tropical island beach, embracing the life I envisioned.

You, too, can carve this path!

Testimonials

  • Recognized for attentive listening and posing thought-provoking questions
  • Harmoniously spiritual yet grounded in practicality
  • Striking a balance between emotions and intellect
  • Known for compassion and accessibility

I am confident that I can contribute significant value to your life, whether addressing workplace challenges, personal hurdles, establishing a business, devising a financial strategy, or guiding you in yoga and meditation.

I offer coaching sessions in person, via phone or video chat, and even through text-based chat.

Get in touch to explore how we can collaborate. The first thirty minutes are complimentary and, naturally, come with no obligations.

Consultation Options

I offer various consultation plans tailored to your needs. Contact me to explore our collaboration further. The initial thirty-minute session is complimentary and carries no obligation.

Individual Sessions

Experience single sessions via Zoom or text chat, each lasting 90 minutes. The fee for each session is €90, inclusive of a brief evaluation after one week.

Gold Plan

Embark on a transformative journey over three months, involving 12 sessions of 90 minutes each. Each session will guide you through key steps of the coaching process, accompanied by regular contact between sessions.

Your investment for this life-changing experience is €999 (payment plans available).

Customized Plan

Custom-tailored plans are available to suit your unique circumstances and requirements!

Contact me for a discovery call!

Testimonials

René stayed at our hotel for several times. Besides teaching some private yoga sessions for clients, we had the pleasure of having his assistance in the field of social media. He also looked with us to the guest experience and quality management. This resulted in various (future) improvements in our hotel and restaurants. With his wide background, creativity and knowledge, René is able to get to the point quickly and be a very appreciated sparring partner and business coach.

Daniel G. - Hotelowner in South East Asia

Disclaimer

By engaging with/reading my coaching services/website/blog/email series, you acknowledge that I am not a licensed psychologist or healthcare professional. My services do not replace the care provided by psychologists or other healthcare professionals. Coaching should not be considered a substitute for psychological counseling, therapy, or medical advice.

I will consistently apply my professional expertise, skills, and care. However, I cannot ensure specific outcomes resulting from coaching efforts, recommendations on my website/blog/courses/products, or my opinions about potential outcomes. I guarantee delivering the purchased coaching services as described, but outcomes may vary.

  

© 2017-2024 Rene Smit

item.title: Acroyoga flowchart
item.dc:creator: renesmit
item.content:encoded:
This is a flowchart with beginning/intermediate L-basing poses. Click on the image to get a bigger version. Below the image is an interactive version with in the future links to videos, (work in progress), full screen visible at https://rcsmit.github.io/acroyoga/index.html

The chart is also available as PDF-file. / The videos in an interactive table

Full screen visible at https://rcsmit.github.io/acroyoga/index.html

item.title: Financial coaching
item.dc:creator: renesmit
item.content:encoded:
Hello, I am René

With a passion for financial independence and smart money management, I help individuals take control of their finances. My background in financial coaching, data analysis, and strategic planning enables me to provide practical, results-driven advice. Whether you're looking to get out of debt, save for the future, or make better financial decisions, I offer the tools and insights to help you succeed.

My secrets:

Save Today, Spend Tomorrow

The foundation of financial success lies in mindful spending and saving. Money that remains unspent today becomes an asset for tomorrow, but borrowing from the future can create financial instability.

Choose or reduce

At the heart of this approach is choosing or reducing—choosing whether a purchase is truly necessary or finding a smarter, more cost-effective alternative. With this mindset, financial freedom isn’t about restriction; it’s about making better choices with what you have.

Track to Transform

With consistent tracking, noting, and reflecting on your spending, you begin to see patterns—and power. Awareness is the first step to change. By knowing exactly where your money goes, you create space to pause, adjust, and align your choices with your goals. Tracking isn’t about control; it’s about clarity. And clarity leads to confidence

How It Works

We work with a proven, data-based method to grow your wealth and reach your goals. Let me guide you through every step—clear, practical, and tailored to your life.

1. Budget Smarter, Not Harder

A budget isn’t about saying “no” to everything—it’s about prioritizing. I help you create a Daily Budget that balances necessities with financial goals, so you:
✔ Avoid unnecessary expenses.
✔ Reduce financial stress.
✔ Build a financial cushion for emergencies and opportunities.

2. Track Every Penny You Spend

Before you can take control of your finances, you need to know where your money goes. Our Expense Tracker helps you monitor:
✔ Cash Transactions – Everyday spending in cash.
✔ Bank Transactions – Digital payments, bills, and transfers.

With better awareness, you can start optimizing your spending.

3. Balance Income & Fixed Expenses

Understanding your financial flow is key. Together, we analyze:
✔ Income – Salary, business revenue, side hustles, and passive income.
✔ Fixed Expenses – Rent, utilities, insurance, subscriptions, and recurring costs.

By ensuring a healthy balance, you can set aside more for savings and investments.

4. Plan for the Future: Short-Term & Long-Term

Good financial health isn’t just about today—it’s about where you’ll be in one, five, or ten years.

We focus on:
✔ Monthly Financial Overview – Assets, debts, and overall financial standing.
✔ Yearly Planning & Projections – Setting realistic financial goals and tracking progress.
✔ Multi-Year Planning & Investments – Developing a strategy for long-term financial security.

5. Build Wealth & Secure Your Future

With the right foundation in place, we work toward:
✔ Creating a sustainable savings plan.
✔ Exploring smart investment opportunities.
✔ Developing strategies for long-term financial independence.

Who Is This Coaching For?

✔ Individuals who want to break free from financial stress and gain control over their money.
✔ Those looking to save more and plan better for the future.
✔ People preparing for major life events—buying a home, traveling, starting a family, or retirement.
✔ Business owners and freelancers who need financial stability and long-term planning.

No matter your financial situation, my coaching is tailored to your needs.

Why Work With Me?

I don’t just focus on numbers—I focus on you. My holistic approach ensures that financial strategies align with your lifestyle and aspirations. Through personalized coaching, you’ll gain not just financial stability but also the confidence to manage money wisely for years to come.

Ready for it?

Financial freedom doesn’t come from quick fixes—it comes from within. You need discipline to stay consistent, even when it’s tempting to veer off track. You need desire—a clear reason why you want change, something that pulls you forward. And you need motivation, the spark that gets you started and the mindset that keeps you going. With these three, anything is possible. The rest, we’ll build together.

Start Your Journey Today

📅 Book a Free Consultation – Let’s discuss your financial goals and create a customized plan.

📩 Get in Touch – Have questions? I’m here to help you build a solid financial future.

🔹 Schedule Your Free Consultation Now 🔹Use one of the social media icons to contact me!

Your financial freedom starts with the right decisions today. Let’s make them together.

Working with René changed the way I think about money. His method is simple, but powerful. I used to feel overwhelmed by my finances—now I feel in control. Tracking my expenses, choosing more consciously, and sticking to my daily budget has helped me save more than I thought possible. And René is there every step of the way to support. - Malu S.

item.title: VA Backbone
item.dc:creator: renesmit
item.content:encoded:
My work as VA Backbone revolves around one principle: empowering others to do their best work.
From my experience in data analysis and automation to graphic design, infographics, and cartography, I help Virtual Assistants and business support professionals save time, reduce errors, and impress their clients.

With years of experience building custom tools, dashboards, and visuals, I know how to turn raw data into clear action — and complex processes into simple, automated workflows.

I’m here to be the invisible engine behind your success, so you can focus on delivering value to your clients while I make sure your systems run smoothly.

Contact me for a discovery call!

How I Can Support You

Where do you want us to work on together ? To give you some ideas….

Data Cleaning & Automation

What would you do with the hours you save by automating repetitive tasks?

Spend less time collecting, fixing and merging data and more time using it.
I clean, organise, and automate your workflows so you can:

  • Reduce repetitive tasks that eat up your day
  • Trust your numbers from the start
  • Update data automatically from multiple sources

Result: You work faster, with fewer errors, and keep clients happy.

Proposal & Report Automation

How much time do you spend creating proposals and reports each week?

Stop retyping the same information again and again.
I build tools that let you:

  • Generate professional PDF proposals and reports in seconds
  • Pull data directly from your existing sheets or systems
  • Keep formatting and branding consistent every time

Result: You send polished documents faster, leaving more time for billable work.

Data Analysis & Infographics

Could your clients understand their results in 10 seconds or less?

Make your clients’ numbers easy to understand.
I turn raw data into visuals that:

  • Highlight trends and opportunities
  • Communicate results instantly
  • Fit neatly into your client reports and presentations

Result: You look like the VA who always delivers clarity and insight.

Custom Maps & Cartography

Would a map make your client’s data easier to explain?

Help your clients see their data in a way they’ll never forget.
I design maps that:

  • Show performance or activity by location
  • Visualise environmental, demographic, or event data
  • Add professional impact to reports and proposals

Result: You impress clients with visuals that tell a clear story.

CRM & Client Tracking

Does your client always know which choice gives the most opportunites?

Keep your clients’ information organised and up to date without endless spreadsheet work.
I create dashboards where you can:

  • See at a glance who needs follow-up
  • Filter by status, region, or service type
  • Get alerts for overdue tasks and meetings

Result: You deliver faster, more responsive service to your clients.


About My Journey

I’ve applied my skills in hospitality, tourism, research, and business support — always aiming to make systems more effective.
From cleaning schedules optimized with probability models, to detailed dashboards for the occupation of accomodations, every project was about one thing: helping people work better with the right data and design.

Now I focus on empowering VA’s and support professionals with the same tools and insights, so they can serve their clients faster, more accurately, and more creatively.

Testimonials

“Rene’s dashboards saved me hours each week. I can now instantly show my client their project’s progress without digging through spreadsheets.” – Freelance VA in Amsterdam

“His maps and analysis made our report both convincing and visually engaging. Professional, thorough, and fast.” – Research Consultant

Work With Me

I offer:

One-off builds

Perfect if you need a specific dashboard, map, or automation now.

Ongoing support

Keep me as your VA Backbone for continuous updates and quick fixes.

Custom plans

Tailored packages based on your workload and goals.

📩 Contact me for a free 30-minute discovery call — let’s see how much time and stress I can save you.

item.title: DJ
item.dc:creator: renesmit
item.content:encoded: Since summer 2025 I’m on the DJ path, with a clear focus on techno and psytrance. The famous Belgian DJ and friend Disar Marxin mentors me and helps me grow fast. Of course you can hire me to DJ, but I think my other qualities will serve you better for this moment.
